user.title: ETA connection
user.description:
Enter the host (IP) and port of your ETA terminal. The initial scan for available endpoints can take several minutes on large systems.

Enable old API mode only if you have problems with the newer ETA API.

select_entities.title: Choose entities

error.unknown_host: Could not connect to the ETA terminal: Wrong host or port
error.no_eta_endpoint: Could not find a valid ETA endpoint. Did you enable the webservices in meinETA?
error.wrong_api_version: API version of ETA terminal is too low. Some entities may not be detected. Please consider updating the firmware of your ETA terminal to the latest version.
error.legacy_mode_selected: Using old API mode. Some entities may not be detected, or may be detected in the wrong category.
error.endpoint_discovery_failed: ETA endpoint discovery failed unexpectedly. Please try again and check the logs if the problem persists.
error.value_update_error: At least one endpoint is reporting an error. The respective entities won't be shown in the list.

progress.discover_entities: Searching your ETA system for available entities. This can take several minutes on large systems. Home Assistant will continue automatically as soon as the scan is finished.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Host already configured. Only a single instance is allowed.

abort.integration_busy: The integration is still starting up or reloading. Please wait a moment and try configuring it again.

init.title: Options
init.description: Choose what you want to do next. You can either only update the parallel API request limit, update values for already selected entities, or rediscover available entities and then update your selection. Higher parallel request values increase load on the ETA unit and may cause errors, especially on older systems.

user.title: Choose entities

data.ignore_decimal_places_restriction_for_wr: HACK: Handle decimal places for these writable sensor values

error.wrong_api_version: API version of ETA terminal is too low. Some entities may not be detected. Please consider updating the firmware of your ETA terminal to the latest version.
error.value_update_error: At least one endpoint could not be updated. You may have to update the list of available sensors.
error.unavailable_sensors: One or more selected sensors are not available any more or have been moved to a different category. Please check the lists of selected sensors for any missing or wrong sensors. You can find a list of affected sensors at the bottom.

write_value.name: Set value
write_value.description: Sets the value of an endpoint (Attention: Exercise caution! A wrong value can render your ETA unit unusable.)

endpoint_url.name: Endpoint URI
endpoint_url.description: URI of the endpoint (only the numeric part, without host and port) (see http://[eta_host]:[eta_port]/user/menu)

begin.name: Begin
begin.description: Optional start time in 15 minute increments since midnight

end.name: End
end.description: Optional end time in 15 minute increments since midnight

write_value_scaled.name: Set scaled value
write_value_scaled.description: Sets the value of an endpoint, applying the scale factor defined in the ETA API

value.name: Value
value.description: The value to be set (in human-readable format)

force_decimals.name: Force decimals
force_decimals.description: If enabled, decimal places will be preserved even if the ETA API does not support them for this endpoint (may lead to errors!)

write_timeslot.name: Update a timeslot
write_timeslot.description: Update the begin and end of a timeslot endpoint

begin.name: Begin
begin.description: The start time of the timeslot

end.name: End
end.description: The end time of the timeslot

write_timeslot_plus_temperature.name: Update a timeslot and its target temperature
write_timeslot_plus_temperature.description: Update the begin, end and temperature of a timeslot endpoint

begin.name: Begin
begin.description: The start time of the timeslot

end.name: End
end.description: The end time of the timeslot

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.description: The target temperature within the timeslot
